task: Highlight carousel slides (MoMorph MaZUn5xHXZ) must render at a fixed size — the design frame pins every slide to a 528x525 box with body text truncated by an ellipsis (node 662:12223 ends in '...'), while the implementation let card height follow content, so the row resized between pages (558px page 1 vs 678px page 2 after the equal-height fix). Fix: slides render KudoCard in a new `fixed` mode (lg:h-[525px] wrappers, line-clamped body with ellipsis, single-line time/title/hashtags, one-row photo strip, overflow clipped); stacked feeds keep intrinsic height; FIX 3: edge peeks used a uniform opacity-40 dim while the design fades side cards into the background via directional gradient overlays (nodes 2940:13469/13467, linear-gradient #00101A 50% -> transparent) — replaced with pointer-events-none absolute gradient overlays per peek
acceptanceCriteria: every carousel slide measures exactly 525px tall on every page at lg+ viewports
long body text is truncated with an ellipsis instead of growing the card
e2e regression test 'carousel slides keep the fixed 525px design height' fails without the fix and passes with it
below lg the card keeps clamped intrinsic height with no horizontal overflow at 375px
All Kudos feed and profile card lists are unaffected (fixed mode is opt-in via prop)
unit tests, tsc --noEmit, eslint (changed files), and next build all pass
each edge peek carries a directional gradient overlay (dark at the outer edge, transparent toward the active card) instead of uniform opacity
e2e regression test 'edge peeks fade into the background via gradient overlays' fails without the fix and passes with it
blastRadius: Highlight carousel layout (active card + peeks + arrows)
KudoCard rendering in All Kudos feed and profile moderation list
contracts: KudoCard props gain optional `fixed?: boolean` (additive; kudo, isSpam unchanged)
HighlightCarousel props (kudos, pageIndex, onPrev, onNext) unchanged
